name: pilot-skills
description: Claude Code plugin skills repository — bundled plugins for spec-driven development and GitHub management

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: PilotSpec — compressed spec-driven development. /sdd:spec, /sdd:build, /sdd:check, /sdd:explain over one SPEC.md. Math-glyph encoding (~75% token cut vs prose). Bug-to-spec backprop. Adapted from JuliusBrussee/cavekit.

plugins.name: gh
plugins.description: PilotPlan — GitHub workflow today (/gh:commit, /gh:issue, /gh:pr, /gh:merge, /gh:release); evolving toward a high-level planning surface. Steno-styled issue & PR text. No code development.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: PilotCore — shared encoder/protocol skills (socratic, steno) for cross-plugin reuse. Required by sdd & gh.
